location: Metropolitan Correctional Center Special Housing Unit, New York, NY
text: OIG 302: Officers Thomas and Noel discovered Epstein hanged in SHU cell 206-220LAD at ~6:30am Aug 10, 2019; cell left unmonitored overnight

location: Metropolitan Correctional Center, New York, NY

location: Metropolitan Correctional Center, New York, NY
text: Signet Technologies tech Jeff McKenzie arrived Aug 12 to examine/replace MCC CCTV and DVR equipment — three days after Epstein's death
